summary: Product manual create/edit carries product_url, image_url, and source; deterministic Naver URL import is bounded and remains SSRF-gated by the allowlisted HTTPS/DNS/private-IP validator. Cleanup blockers for URL schemes, private-address classification, UI copy, IPv6 link-local/reserved/special-use gaps, and 2001::/23 plus 2001:db8::/32 handling were resolved and covered by tests.

reviewBlockerEvidence: agent://109-G004CleanupReview reported BLOCKING findings for URL scheme validation and private-address classification; both were fixed.
agent://112-G004CleanupRerun reported an advisory that ProductCreatePanel still said 자동 크롤링; the UI/status copy was renamed and covered by tests.

agent://115-G004CleanupFinal reported a BLOCKING IPv6 link-local/reserved classification gap; fe80::/10, multicast, documentation, translation, discard-only, 2001::/23, 2002::/16, 3fff::/20, and IPv4-mapped private handling are now covered.
agent://118-G004CleanupClean reported a remaining IPv6 special-use/range classifier gap; compressed 2001::/23 and 2001:db8::/32 documentation handling are now covered.
behavior: ProductFormValues includes product_url, image_url, and source.
Manual create/edit form state includes visible 상품 URL, 이미지 URL, and 출처 controls.
toProductPatchInput trims optional URL/source fields and omits blank optional fields while defaulting manual source to manual.
Product edit seeds product_url, image_url, and source from the existing product record.
Product schemas bound product metadata lengths, restrict product_url to http/https/manual schemes, restrict image_url to http/https, and bound import URL length to 2048.
Naver import parser uses only deterministic URL/path/query metadata, trims and bounds parsed text, normalizes path slugs, validates image URLs syntactically, and creates no generic fallback product.

validateProductImportUrl trims input, bounds import URL length, requires HTTPS, allowlists Naver Shopping hosts, performs DNS lookup, and blocks private/reserved IPv4, private/reserved IPv6, link-local, loopback, multicast, documentation, translation, discard-only, 6to4, and IPv4-mapped private ranges.
Product import UI/status copy says URL information import instead of crawling.

commands.command: npx biome check --write lib/security/productImport.ts tests/products-screen-contract.test.ts tests/p4-contract.test.ts

npx biome check components/products/types.ts components/products/productForm.ts components/products/ProductCreatePanel.tsx components/products/ProductEditPanel.tsx components/products/ProductManager.tsx lib/products/service.ts lib/security/productImport.ts tests/products-screen-contract.test.ts tests/p4-contract.test.ts
